mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_lots(product_id, expiration_date, stock_qty, price) VALUES (#{productId}, #{expirationDate}, #{stockQty}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT lot_id, product_id, expiration_date, stock_qty, price, created_at FROM product_lots WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY expiration_date ASC, price ASC
